title: rubus × racemosus
intro: Rubus × racemosus, also known as the raspberry rose or fragrant raspberry, is a hybrid species of the genus Rubus, typically characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × racemosus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × racemosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for their medicinal and culinary purposes.
